Skip to content
Sam Stringer-Hye
  • Home
  • Work

Every pixel, on purpose.

The short version.

Associate Design Director at Razorfish with 10+ years across UI, UX, motion, and design systems. I've shipped work for Samsung, Frontier, and CVS. Mostly I obsess over the details most people scroll right past.

Selected Work

Samsung Bespoke Design Studio

MyFrontier App Redesign

Samsung.com Redesign

CVS Shop Website Redesign

Experience

2012–2014

Motion Designer

NowThis News

Built the motion system behind NowThis's high-volume social video output and contributed to early brand identity work.

2014–2016

Art Director

Mashable

Led design and motion direction for Mashable's Snapchat Discover presence and managed day-to-day creative production.

2016–2018

Product Designer

Independent

Built interactive prototypes and motion systems for early-stage products and client pitches. The kind of work that turns a deck into something you can actually click through.

2018–2021

Senior Designer

Razorfish

Designed flows, prototypes, and motion systems for enterprise clients. Very focused on craft and reducing friction wherever possible.

2021–Present

Associate Design Director

Razorfish

Leads UX and design systems across B2C product redesigns at scale. Mentors teams, owns outcomes, ships the work.

2012

2013

2014

2015

2016

2017

2018

2019

2020

2021

2022

2023

2024

2025

Sam Stringer-Hye

© 2026

Colophon

Sam Stringer-Hye

Product designer at Razorfish with 10+ years across UI, UX, motion, and design systems. I've shipped work for Samsung, Frontier, and CVS. Mostly I obsess over the details most people scroll right past.

I care a lot about craft. How a transition feels, whether the type hierarchy actually works, if a component holds up at every breakpoint. That stuff never shows up in a brief, but you always notice it in the final product.

sam@samstringerhye.com LinkedIn (opens in new tab) Download Resume
